ai_news.title: The US blacklisted Anthropic as a security threat. Its spy agencies are using Claude anyway.
AI agents are quietly generating chaos engineering failures enterprises don’t track yet
Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot ‘personalities’

micro_tips.sql: EXPLAIN ANALYZE prikazuje stvarne vs procijenjene redove — ključno za tuning
micro_tips.oracle: CONNECT BY LEVEL <= n generira broj redova bez pomoćne tablice
micro_tips.regex: [^\n]* svaki znak osim newline — dohvati cijelu liniju bez dotall flaga
